requirements.task_name: Apply for the cheapest full-day nursery within 3 km for a 3-year-old starting on 2025-09-01
requirements.task_description: Find nurseries for a 3-year-old starting on 2025-09-01 within 3 km of home, filter to full-day care with a maximum monthly fee of 600, sort by fee low to high, and submit an application to the cheapest option that meets these criteria.

requirements.task_name: Save the earliest-opening highly rated Downtown nursery to favorites
requirements.task_description: Search for nurseries in the Downtown district with a rating of at least 4.5 stars that open no later than 07:00, sort by earliest opening time, and add the earliest-opening nursery that meets these criteria to the favorites list.

requirements.task_name: Book a morning visit next Wednesday at a nearby nursery with a playground under 550 monthly fee
requirements.task_description: Find nurseries within 2 km for a 2-year-old that have a large outdoor playground and monthly fees of 550 or less, sort by rating, and book a visit for the next Wednesday between 09:00 and 11:00 at the highest-rated option.

requirements.task_name: Register a 4–5-year-old for two different July afternoon activities under 30 at the same center
requirements.task_description: Find municipal daycare activities for children aged 4–5 in July 2025, filter to afternoon sessions costing no more than 30 per session, and register for two different activities that take place at the same center, adding both to the registration list.

requirements.task_name: Use the fee calculator to compare half-day vs full-day costs and save the cheaper plan
requirements.task_description: Open the fee calculator, calculate monthly costs for a 2-year-old from a household with monthly income 3200 for both half-day and full-day schedules (5 days per week), compare the amounts, and save the schedule option that shows the lower monthly fee as the preferred plan.

requirements.task_name: Create a ranked application with three full-day nurseries in the North district ordered by rating
requirements.task_description: Find nurseries in the North district that offer full-day care for 1-year-olds, sort them by rating high to low, select the top three, and create an application where these three nurseries are added and ranked as preferences 1–3 according to their ratings (highest rated as preference 1).

requirements.task_name: Find an allergy-friendly nursery and send a meals inquiry via the contact form
requirements.task_description: Search for nurseries within 4 km that offer both nut-free menus and lactose-free options, open one nursery’s details, then use the site’s contact form to send a message asking about allergy handling at that specific nursery, including your contact information.

requirements.task_name: Choose the first open day after 2025-08-15 from the closure calendar and start an application with that date
requirements.task_description: Use the calendar of holiday closures to find the first date after 2025-08-15 that is not marked as closed, then start a new application using that date as the desired start date for a 2-year-old in the East district with full-day care.
